title: Property Consultant - RERA Authorities - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - RERA Authorities - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!
